_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.
_publications._context: ...evaluated the efficacy of the CDK4/6 inhibitor, abemaciclib, and the ERK1/2 inhibitor, LY3214996, alone and in combination in reducing PNF tumor burden in Nf1flox/flox;PostnCre mice... | Genetically engineered Nf1 flox/flox ;PostnCre mice on a mixed C57BL/6 × 129/SV background were utilized for in vivo studies | wild-type (wt), Nf1 flox/flox- ;Postn-Cre and Nf1-Arf flox/flox ;Postn-Cre mouse tissues | The Nf1flox/flox PostnCre+ mice were developed and bred by the Clapp Laboratory utilizing tools reported previously | RNAseq data from Nf1flox/flox;PostnCre+ and Nf1flox/flox;Arf flox/flox;PostnCre+ mice
